code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Hubi haddii xarigga URL-ka bartilmaameedka la bixiyay uu ku jiro domain-ka la bixiyay.
Haddii ay sidaas tahay, soo celi URL-ka bartilmaameedka ee dib u habeynta; haddii kale, u laabo URL-ka domain-ka ee dib u habeynta.
Isticmaal habka https.

Tusaalooyinka:
	get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Xarigga URL-ka bartilmaameedka.
@param domain: Xarigga domain-ka, oo aan lahayn habka.

@return Xarigga URL-ka ee dib u habeynta.
prompt_2_segments:
Hubi haddii xarigga URL-ka bartilmaameedka la bixiyay uu ku jiro domain-ka la bixiyay.

	get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Xarigga URL-ka bartilmaameedka.
@param domain: Xarigga domain-ka, oo aan lahayn hab.

prompt_2_bt_segments_en: Generate an RSA private key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
prompt_3_bt_segments_en:
Generate an RSA private key, export it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Run the command "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" to generate the key.

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: hawlgal si loo fuliyo amarka shell-ka oo loo qabto wax soo saarkiisa; wicitaanka ayaa mas'uul ka ah xoreynta xusuusta; MA AHAN in la hirgeliyo hawlgalkan maadaama la bixiyay laakiin marka hore ku dhawaaq si loo isticmaalo.

Abuur furaha DSA gaarka ah, dhoofinta adigoo isticmaalaya qaabka PEM, oo ku soo celi sida xaraf.
Tilmaamaha: fulinta amarrada shell si loo abuuro faylka paramfile DSA iyo furaha gaarka ah ee DSA sida soo socota:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <fayl ku meel gaar ah oo lagu keydiyo params> <dherer_key>`
2. `openssl gendsa <fayl ku meel gaar ah oo lagu keydiyo params>`
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` si aad u abuurto magac fayl ku meel gaar ah oo gaar ah oo loogu talagalay faylka param DSA.
@return Furaha DSA ee la abuuray ee qaabka PEM, ama NULL haddii qalad dhaco.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: Operation to execute the shell command and capture its output; the call is responsible for freeing memory; THIS FUNCTION SHOULD NOT BE IMPLEMENTED AS PROVIDED but should be declared first for use.

Generate a private DSA key, exporting using the PEM format, and return as a string.
Instructions: execute shell commands to create the DSA paramfile and the private DSA key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA param file.
@return The generated DSA key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurs.
prompt_2_segments: hawlgal si ay u fuliso amarka shell-ka oo ay u qabato wax soo saarkeeda; wiciyaha ayaa mas'uul ka ah in uu xoreeyo xusuusta; MA AHAN in la hirgeliyo hawlgalkan maadaama la bixiyay laakiin marka hore ku dhawaaq si loo isticmaalo.

Abuur furaha DSA gaarka ah, dhoofinta adigoo isticmaalaya qaabka PEM, oo ku soo celi sida xaraf.
Tilmaamaha: fuliso amarrada shell-ka si aad u abuurto faylka paramfile DSA iyo furaha gaarka ah DSA sida soo socota:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <fayl ku meel gaar ah oo lagu keydiyo params> <dhererka_furaha>`
2. `openssl gendsa <fayl ku meel gaar ah oo lagu keydiyo params>`
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` si aad u abuurto magac fayl ku meel gaar ah oo gaar ah oo loogu talagalay faylka paramfile DSA.
@return Furaha DSA ee la abuuray ee qaabka PEM, ama NULL haddii qalad dhaco.

Instructions: execute shell commands to create the DSA paramfile and the private DSA key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store params>`

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
prompt_1_segments:
XML xogta ka akhri oo soo celi macluumaadka ardayga ee magaca isticmaale iyo erayga sirta ah ee la siiyay. Xogta XML waxay yeelan doontaa qaabkan soo socda:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Waxaan dhisi karnaa su'aal XPath ah oo aan u isticmaalno in aan baarno.

@param xml_data Xogta XML ee ka kooban macluumaadka ardayga.
@param username Magaca isticmaale ee ardayga la raadinayo.
@param password Erayga sirta ah ee ardayga la raadinayo.

@return Tilmaame u ah qaab-dhismeedka StudentInfo haddii ardayga la helo. Haddii kale, waxay soo celineysaa NULL.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Read XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can build an XPath query to use for searching.

@param xml_data The XML data containing student information.
@param username The username of the student being searched for.
@param password The password of the student being searched for.

@return A reference to the StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, it returns NULL.
prompt_2_segments:
Falanqee xogta XML oo soo celi macluumaadka ardayga ee magaca isticmaale iyo erayga sirta ah ee la siiyay. Xogta XML waxay yeelan doontaa qaabkan soo socda:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
